prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 2×2 character pose sheet for a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; preserve the young scholar on its left as the exact identity, facial shape, topknot, muted blue-gray robe, tea-brown sash, book bundle and paper-collage construction
Primary request: four complete full-body poses of the same young Li Bai, one pose per equal cell in reading order: 1 seated at a low desk looking discouraged over a blank page; 2 walking downhill carrying the same book bundle; 3 standing with slight surprise and one hand raised as if asking a question; 4 standing still and looking thoughtfully toward the lower right
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, hand-torn fibrous edges, restrained ink outlines, matte mineral pigments, dimensional paper shadows matching Image 1
Composition/framing: exact 2 columns × 2 rows, one centered figure per cell, consistent scale and identity, generous padding, no overlap between cells, all heads, hands and feet complete
Scene/backdrop: every cell uses the same perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background; no floor plane, shadow, gradient, texture or divider line
Constraints: generalized Tang-era clothing; no text, labels, watermark, logo, extra people or modern items; no #ff00ff in figure; stable anatomy and costume continuity
Avoid: anime, chibi, photorealism, glossy 3D, cropped limbs, duplicate limbs, changing outfit or face
